texto: I like the relationship between the master and the student. Each piece has new problems, and each is different. They're all an indentured servitude. There's that subjugation that you have to put yourself under. It's a give and take. There is work involved, and during that time, the greatest things are revealed.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Mike Bidlo: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “I like the relationship between the master and the student. Each piece has new problems, and each…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que trabalho, work, time pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e time.
